# Testing Reference

Use the in-process clients to test Quater apps without starting Granian
or opening a socket. This keeps tests fast and makes auth, cookies,
lifespan hooks, MCP tools, and response bodies easy to assert.

For examples, read the [Testing guide](/en/latest/testing).

```python
from quater import MCPTestClient, TestClient, TestResponse
```

## TestClient {#symbol-testclient}

Public import: `from quater import TestClient`.

Async in-process client for HTTP-style tests.

Use it with `async with` when your app has startup or shutdown hooks.

```python
TestClient(
    app: object,
    *,
    host: str = 'testserver',
    scheme: Literal['http', 'https'] = 'http',
    client: str = '127.0.0.1',
    headers: HeaderItems | Mapping[str, str] | None = None,
    cookies: Mapping[str, str] | None = None,
)
```

### Constructor parameters

| Name | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `app` | `object` | Quater app under test. |
| `host` | `str` | Host header used for requests. |
| `scheme` | `Literal['http', 'https']` | Request scheme. |
| `client` | `str` | Client address attached to requests. |
| `headers` | [`HeaderItems`](/en/latest/reference/request#type-headeritems) \| Mapping[str, str] \| None | Default headers. |
| `cookies` | `Mapping[str, str] \| None` | Initial cookie jar. |

Common methods:

| Method | Use it for |
| --- | --- |
| `request(method, path, ...)` | Send any method. |
| `get`, `post`, `put`, `patch`, `delete` | Convenience methods. |
| `set_cookie(name, value)` | Store a cookie for later requests. |
| `clear_cookies()` | Clear stored cookies. |
| `startup()` / `shutdown()` | Run lifespan manually. |

```python
request(
    method: str,
    path: str,
    *,
    params: QueryParams | None = None,
    headers: HeaderItems | Mapping[str, str] | None = None,
    cookies: Mapping[str, str] | None = None,
    json: object = None,
    content: RequestContent | None = None,
) -> TestResponse
```

### `request()` parameters

| Name | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `method` | `str` | HTTP method. |
| `path` | `str` | Request path, optionally with a query string. |
| `params` | [`QueryParams`](/en/latest/reference/request#queryparams) \| None | Extra query parameters. |
| `headers` | [`HeaderItems`](/en/latest/reference/request#type-headeritems) \| Mapping[str, str] \| None | Request headers. |
| `cookies` | `Mapping[str, str] \| None` | Request cookies. |
| `json` | `object` | JSON body to encode. |
| `content` | [`RequestContent`](/en/latest/reference/testing#type-requestcontent) \| None | Raw request body content. |

## TestResponse {#symbol-testresponse}

Public import: `from quater import TestResponse`.

Response returned by [`TestClient`](#symbol-testclient).

It stores the collected body, headers, status code, and JSON helpers.

```python
TestResponse(*, status_code: int, headers: HeaderItems, body: bytes)
```

### Constructor parameters

| Name | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `status_code` | `int` | Response status code. |
| `headers` | [`HeaderItems`](/en/latest/reference/request#type-headeritems) | Collected response headers. |
| `body` | `bytes` | Collected response body. |

| Property or method | What it returns |
| --- | --- |
| `status_code` | Integer response status. |
| `headers` | Parsed response headers. |
| `body` | Raw response bytes. |
| `text` | UTF-8 decoded body. |
| `is_success` | `True` for `2xx` and `3xx` responses. |
| `json()` | Parsed JSON body. |

## MCPTestClient {#symbol-mcptestclient}

Public import: `from quater import MCPTestClient`.

Small JSON-RPC helper bound to a [`TestClient`](#symbol-testclient).

Use `client.mcp` in tests. It sends MCP requests through the same app
pipeline as a real MCP client.

```python
MCPTestClient(client: TestClient)
```

### Constructor parameters

| Name | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `client` | [`TestClient`](/en/latest/reference/testing#symbol-testclient) | HTTP test client used for MCP requests. |

Common methods:

| Method | Use it for |
| --- | --- |
| `initialize(...)` | Send MCP `initialize`. |
| `tools_list(...)` | List exposed tools. |
| `tools_call(name, arguments, ...)` | Call an exposed tool. |
| `request(payload, ...)` | Send a custom JSON-RPC payload. |

```python
tools_call(
    name: str,
    arguments: Mapping[str, object] | None = None,
    *,
    request_id: JSONRPCID = 1,
    token: str | None = None,
    origin: str | None = None,
    approval_token: str | None = None,
    meta: Mapping[str, object] | None = None,
    protocol_version: str = '2025-11-25',
    headers: HeaderItems | Mapping[str, str] | None = None,
) -> TestResponse
```

### `tools_call()` parameters

| Name | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `str` | Tool name to call. |
| `arguments` | `Mapping[str, object] \| None` | Tool arguments. |
| `request_id` | [`JSONRPCID`](/en/latest/reference/testing#type-jsonrpcid) | JSON-RPC request id. |
| `token` | `str \| None` | Bearer token used for MCP auth. |
| `origin` | `str \| None` | Origin header used for MCP origin checks. |
| `approval_token` | `str \| None` | Approval token for protected tools. |
| `meta` | `Mapping[str, object] \| None` | Optional MCP `_meta` payload. |
| `protocol_version` | `str` | MCP protocol version header. |
| `headers` | [`HeaderItems`](/en/latest/reference/request#type-headeritems) \| Mapping[str, str] \| None | Extra request headers. |

## Type Names Used Here

| Name | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| <span id="type-headeritems"></span>`HeaderItems` | `(name, value)` header pairs. See [Request headers](./request#headers). |
| <span id="type-queryparams"></span>`QueryParams` | Mapping or sequence accepted by [`TestClient`](#symbol-testclient). |
| <span id="type-requestcontent"></span>`RequestContent` | `bytes`, `bytearray`, `memoryview`, or `str` request body content. |
| <span id="type-jsonrpcid"></span>`JSONRPCID` | MCP JSON-RPC request id, either `str` or `int`. |
